name: CIB seven - HTTP Connector
description: Make an HTTP(S) request from a Service Task via the CIB seven HTTP connector (connectorId: http-connector).

properties.label: URL
properties.description: Absolute target URL, e.g. https://api.example.com/v1/orders. Expressions are allowed, e.g. ${baseUrl}/orders.

properties.label: Headers (map)
properties.description: Expression resolving to a Map<String,String>, e.g. ${ {"Content-Type":"application/json","Authorization":"Bearer "+token} }. Leave empty if not needed.

properties.label: Payload (body)
properties.description: Request body for POST/PUT/PATCH. A String or an expression, e.g. ${orderJson}.

properties.label: Request config (map)
properties.description: Optional expression resolving to a Map of request-config options, e.g. ${ {"connection-timeout":5000,"response-timeout":10000,"redirects-enabled":true} }. Supported keys: authentication-enabled, circular-redirects-allowed, connection-timeout, connection-keep-alive, connection-request-timeout, content-compression-enabled, cookie-spec, expect-continue-enabled, hard-cancellation-enabled, max-redirects, proxy, proxy-preferred-auth-scheme, redirects-enabled, response-timeout, target-preferred-auth-schemes.

properties.label: Status code -> variable
properties.description: Process variable that receives the HTTP status code.

properties.label: Response body -> variable
properties.description: Process variable that receives the response body.

properties.label: Response headers -> variable
properties.description: Optional. Process variable that receives the response headers map. Leave empty to skip.
